query:
SELECT fi.name as feed_item, fi.unit,
  ROUND(SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL
  )), 3) as daily_consumption_kg,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fsl2.transactionType IN ('purchase','stock_count') THEN fsl2.qty WHEN fsl2.transactionType = 'consumption' THEN -fsl2.qty ELSE 0 END),0)
   FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl2 WHERE fsl2.feedItemId = fi.id) as stock_on_hand
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON rp.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
GROUP BY fi.id, fi.name, fi.unit
ORDER BY fi.name;

  ROUND(SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL
  )), 3) as daily_consumption_kg,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN fsl2.transactionType IN ('purchase','stock_count') THEN fsl2.qty WHEN fsl2.transactionType = 'consumption' THEN -fsl2.qty ELSE 0 END),0)
   FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl2 WHERE fsl2.feedItemId = fi.id) as stock_on_hand
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON rp.feedItemId = fi.id
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
GROUP BY fi.id, fi.name, fi.unit
ORDER BY fi.name;
